counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---
# ESP32 and relay board batch

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |

| alias          | house_mesh_esp32_order      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-05                  |
| total_eur      | 44                          |
| counterparty   | 深圳市海云电子                     |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Foundry                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | ESP32-C3 dev boards | 4   | 8        | 32       |
| 2 | relay modules       | 2   | 6        | 12       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL               |     |          | 44       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item and completed OCR structuring for all bills related to Foundry. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to three purchase records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read system workflows before task work, used canonical entity resolution (Foundry record) before finance lookup, preserved full original body text under new frontmatter per migration rule, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR bills related to Foundry. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/foundry.md established the target identity; workspace search found three purchase bills with related_entity Foundry. Each of those files contained visible bill metadata and line items sufficient for required fields in the finance bill schema, so frontmatter was added accordingly and bodies preserved exactly. Inbox processing workflow requires deleting the processed inbox file after successful completion, which was done.
